chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-4208 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For hearing of CMA No.19382/2023 2. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 04.09.2025 Mr. Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. ------------------------------------ This is an old case of 2023, which is over 02 years ago. On 25.09.2023, a counsel was holding brief on behalf of the learned counsel for the Petitioner. On 21.10.2024, none was present for the petitioner, without intimation. In the last 02 years, learned counsel for petitioner has not pursued this petition diligently. Once again, despite lapse of 02 years, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is hereby dismissed on account of non-prosecution along with pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
